reviews.author: Anjani Godugu
reviews.review_body:
I am extremely pleased with my experience at Zee high school. From the moment I enrolled my child, I knew it was the right choice.The faculty and staff at School  are exceptional.
The school fosters a warm and inclusive environment where students feel safe, valued, and encouraged to express themselves.
It is a place where students thrive, grow, and become well-rounded individuals ready to face the future with confidence.
In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Zee High School to any parent seeking a school that prioritizes academic excellence, character development, and a strong sense of community.

reviews.author: manal (Manal)
reviews.review_body: Zee high school is not a suitable educational institution for your children due to safety concerns and a lack of empathy, particularly towards Muslim students. Recent news reports reveal that teachers at this school violate students' personal space and privacy by touching them inappropriately. Furthermore, teachers have been known to physically handle students and force them to remove their hijabs. Instead of focusing on teaching, this school seems more preoccupied with students' appearance and attire, which is unacceptable. The issue extends beyond teachers, as even the principal is involved, prohibiting students from wearing any religious symbols on their heads or hands. Disturbingly, students have been deprived of food and had their phones confiscated when attempting to contact their parents about the situation. Clearly, the safety of students should take precedence over the quality of education provided by the institution. Given the likelihood of the school's closure, it is advisable to withdraw your children from Zee high school and for other parents to avoid considering this institution for their children's education.

reviews.author: Gajendra Saini
reviews.review_body: I am a father of a child who goes to Zee High School, and I have nothing but good things to say about this school. The teachers are very experienced and caring, which is what I wanted for my son. The school is also well-known for its infrastructure, with the recent upgrade of its facilities, including the library and swimming pool.

reviews.author: Rajendra Rathore
reviews.review_body: I am happy to be going to Zee High School. The school has an excellent infrastructure, and all the teachers are caring and professional; they know how to teach the students. I am very excited to start my future journey with them.

reviews.author: Ashish Awana
reviews.review_body: I am a student at Zee High School, and I love it. The teachers are very experienced, and they teach each subject in-depth. Moreover, they tend to make the lessons more interactive to engage us in class time. As a result, I have learned many things I wouldn't have had any idea about.
